mandatory.item: coffee/latte cup (partial view, foam art or steam)
green plant sprig or small potted plant

lifestyle_props.rule: Props frame mockups without overlapping text; keep cozy workspace aesthetic

mockup_composition.style: realistic digital mockups with soft drop shadows and slight elevation
mockup_composition.arrangement: 2-5 overlapping/fanned elements for depth and bundle feel
common_patterns: 2 certificates/cards rotated 8-15 degrees behind main one
1 large centered flyer + surrounding floating pieces
Central laptop/phone screen showing product + orbiting cards/docs
mockup_composition.main_focus: Product mockup(s) occupy central 60-75% of canvas

color_palette.text: black/dark gray on light; white on dark banners

hierarchy.style: bold or semi-bold sans-serif (e.g. Montserrat Bold, Bebas Neue)
smaller uppercase sans or light italic script

mandatory.position: bottom-right corner of canvas or banner

optional_bonus: FREE BONUS cover letters & affirmation cards

bottom_banner.sharp_cutoff: clean horizontal line separating from background
bottom_banner.overlap: props can slightly overlap banner edges for flow

niche_adaptation_rules.props: Keep core (coffee + plant); optional swap 1 prop if strongly thematic
niche_adaptation_rules.text: Update title, subtitle, mockup placeholders only
